presentation.d3_code: return (async function () { const svg = d3.select(svgElement); const plot = svg.select('g[transform]'); const plotWidth = +svg.attr('data-plot-w'); const plotHeight = +svg.attr('data-plot-h'); const duration = 1100; const ease = d3.easeCubicInOut; const selectedYears = [2019, 2023]; const allBars = plot.selectAll('rect.main-bar'); const allData = allBars.data().map(d => ({ year: +d.Year, company: d.key, value: +d.value })); const companies = Array.from(new Set(allData.map(d => d.company))); const groupedYMax = d3.max( allData.filter(d => selectedYears.includes(d.year)), d => d.value ); const groupedY = d3.scaleLinear() .domain([0, groupedYMax]) .nice() .range([plotHeight, 0]); const groupedYAxis = d3.axisLeft(groupedY) .ticks(5) .tickFormat(d3.format("d")); const companyX = d3.scaleBand() .domain(companies) .range([0, plotWidth]) .paddingInner(0.22) .paddingOuter(0.08); const yearX = d3.scaleBand() .domain(selectedYears) .range([0, companyX.bandwidth()]) .paddingInner(0.16) .paddingOuter(0.12); const xAxisG = plot.select('.x-axis'); const yAxisG = plot.select('.y-axis'); const annotationLayer = plot.select('.annotation-layer').empty() ? plot.append('g').attr('class', 'annotation-layer').style('pointer-events', 'none') : plot.select('.annotation-layer'); plot.selectAll('.year-sub-label').remove(); annotationLayer.selectAll('*').remove(); const defs = svg.select('defs').empty() ? svg.append('defs') : svg.select('defs'); defs.select('#difference-arrow').remove(); defs.append('marker') .attr('id', 'difference-arrow') .attr('viewBox', '0 -5 10 10') .attr('refX', 5) .attr('refY', 0) .attr('markerWidth', 6) .attr('markerHeight', 6) .attr('orient', 'auto-start-reverse') .append('path') .attr('d', 'M0,-5L10,0L0,5') .attr('fill', 'red'); const fadeTransition = svg.transition() .duration(700) .ease(ease); allBars .filter(d => !selectedYears.includes(+d.Year)) .transition(fadeTransition) .style('opacity', 0) .attr('y', plotHeight) .attr('height', 0); await fadeTransition.end().catch(() => {}); allBars .filter(d => !selectedYears.includes(+d.Year)) .style('display', 'none'); const mainTransition = svg.transition() .duration(duration) .ease(ease); allBars .filter(d => selectedYears.includes(+d.Year)) .style('opacity', 1) .transition(mainTransition) .attr('x', d => companyX(d.key) + yearX(+d.Year)) .attr('width', yearX.bandwidth()) .attr('y', d => groupedY(+d.value)) .attr('height', d => plotHeight - groupedY(+d.value)); xAxisG.transition(mainTransition).call(d3.axisBottom(companyX)); yAxisG.transition(mainTransition).call(groupedYAxis); xAxisG.selectAll('text') .attr('font-size', 15) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('transform', null) .attr('dx', null) .attr('dy', null); yAxisG.selectAll('text') .attr('font-size', 15); svg.select('.x-axis-label').text('Company'); svg.select('.y-axis-label').text('Total GHG Emissions (Million tCO2e)'); const yearSubLabels = plot.selectAll('.year-sub-label') .data(companies.flatMap(company => selectedYears.map(year => ({ company, year })))) .enter() .append('text') .attr('class', 'year-sub-label') .attr('x', d => companyX(d.company) + yearX(d.year) + yearX.bandwidth() / 2) .attr('y', plotHeight + 36) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('font-size', 12) .attr('opacity', 0) .text(d => d.year); yearSubLabels.transition(mainTransition).style('opacity', 1); await mainTransition.end().catch(() => {}); const groupedData = companies.flatMap(company => selectedYears.map(year => { const datum = allData.find(d => d.company === company && d.year === year); return { company, year, value: datum.value, x: companyX(company) + yearX(year), y: groupedY(datum.value), width: yearX.bandwidth(), height: plotHeight - groupedY(datum.value) }; }) ); const companyDiffData = companies.map(company => { const bar2019 = groupedData.find(d => d.company === company && d.year === 2019); const bar2023 = groupedData.find(d => d.company === company && d.year === 2023); const redLineY = bar2023.y; const groupLeft = Math.min(bar2019.x, bar2023.x); const groupRight = Math.max(bar2019.x + bar2019.width, bar2023.x + bar2023.width); return { company, bar2019, bar2023, redLineY, diffLabelX: (groupLeft + groupRight) / 2, diffLabelY: redLineY - 8, diff: +(bar2023.value - bar2019.value).toFixed(1) }; }); const valueLabels = annotationLayer.selectAll('.bar-value-label') .data(groupedData) .enter() .append('text') .attr('class', 'bar-value-label') .attr('x', d => d.x + d.width / 2) .attr('y', d => d.y + Math.max(14, Math.min(d.height / 2, 22))) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('dominant-baseline', 'middle') .attr('font-size', 12) .attr('font-weight', '600') .attr('fill', 'white') .style('opacity', 0) .text(d => d.value); const redLines = annotationLayer.selectAll('.difference-red-line') .data(companyDiffData) .enter() .append('line') .attr('class', 'difference-red-line') .attr('x1', d => d.bar2023.x) .attr('x2', d => d.bar2023.x) .attr('y1', d => d.redLineY) .attr('y2', d => d.redLineY) .attr('stroke', 'red') .attr('stroke-width', 2) .style('opacity', 0); const arrows = annotationLayer.selectAll('.difference-arrow-line') .data(companyDiffData) .enter() .append('line') .attr('class', 'difference-arrow-line') .attr('x1', d => d.bar2019.x) .attr('x2', d => d.bar2019.x) .attr('y1', d => d.bar2019.y) .attr('y2', d => d.bar2019.y) .attr('stroke', 'red') .attr('stroke-width', 2) .attr('marker-start', 'url(#difference-arrow)') .attr('marker-end', 'url(#difference-arrow)') .style('opacity', 0); const diffLabels = annotationLayer.selectAll('.difference-label') .data(companyDiffData) .enter() .append('text') .attr('class', 'difference-label') .attr('x', d => d.diffLabelX) .attr('y', d => d.diffLabelY) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('font-size', 12) .attr('font-weight', '600') .attr('fill', 'black') .style('opacity', 0) .text(d => `Difference: ${d.diff}`); const annotationTransition = svg.transition() .duration(700) .ease(ease); valueLabels.transition(annotationTransition).style('opacity', 1); redLines.transition(annotationTransition) .style('opacity', 1) .attr('x2', d => d.bar2019.x); arrows.transition(annotationTransition) .style('opacity', 1) .attr('y2', d => d.redLineY); diffLabels.transition(annotationTransition).style('opacity', 1); return annotationTransition.end().catch(() => {}); })();

presentation.text_chunk: Amazon shows the largest increase from 51.2 to 68.0 million tCO₂e, while Microsoft shows the smallest increase from 11.2 to 15.4 million tCO₂e.

presentation.d3_code: return (async function () { const svg = d3.select(svgElement); const plot = svg.select('g[transform]'); const plotWidth = +svg.attr('data-plot-w'); const plotHeight = +svg.attr('data-plot-h'); const ease = d3.easeCubicInOut; const duration = 1000; const bars = plot.selectAll('rect.main-bar') .filter(function () { return d3.select(this).style('display') !== 'none'; }); const scene1Data = bars.data().map(d => ({ company: d.key, year: +d.Year, value: +d.value })); const companies = Array.from(new Set(scene1Data.map(d => d.company))); const diffData = companies.map(company => { const value2019 = scene1Data.find(d => d.company === company && d.year === 2019)?.value ?? 0; const value2023 = scene1Data.find(d => d.company === company && d.year === 2023)?.value ?? 0; return { company, diff: +(value2023 - value2019).toFixed(1) }; }); const diffMap = new Map(diffData.map(d => [d.company, d.diff])); const diffLabels = companies.map(company => `${company} (Diff: 2019, 2023)`); const diffLabelByCompany = new Map(companies.map(company => [company, `${company} (Diff: 2019, 2023)`])); const diffX = d3.scaleBand() .domain(diffLabels) .range([0, plotWidth]) .paddingInner(0.22) .paddingOuter(0.08); const diffY = d3.scaleLinear() .domain([0, d3.max(diffData, d => d.diff)]) .nice() .range([plotHeight, 0]); const diffXAxis = d3.axisBottom(diffX); const diffYAxis = d3.axisLeft(diffY) .ticks(5) .tickFormat(d3.format('.1f')); const xAxisG = plot.select('.x-axis'); const yAxisG = plot.select('.y-axis'); const annotationLayer = plot.select('.annotation-layer').empty() ? plot.append('g').attr('class', 'annotation-layer').style('pointer-events', 'none') : plot.select('.annotation-layer'); plot.selectAll('.year-sub-label').remove(); annotationLayer.selectAll('*').remove(); const transition = svg.transition() .duration(duration) .ease(ease); plot.selectAll('rect.main-bar') .filter(d => +d.Year === 2019) .transition(transition) .style('opacity', 0) .attr('y', plotHeight) .attr('height', 0); plot.selectAll('rect.main-bar') .filter(d => +d.Year === 2023) .transition(transition) .style('opacity', 1) .attr('x', d => diffX(diffLabelByCompany.get(d.key))) .attr('width', diffX.bandwidth()) .attr('y', d => diffY(diffMap.get(d.key))) .attr('height', d => plotHeight - diffY(diffMap.get(d.key))); xAxisG.transition(transition).call(diffXAxis); yAxisG.transition(transition).call(diffYAxis); xAxisG.selectAll('text') .attr('font-size', 12) .attr('text-anchor', 'end') .attr('transform', 'rotate(-25)') .attr('dx', '-0.35em') .attr('dy', '0.9em'); yAxisG.selectAll('text') .attr('font-size', 15); svg.select('.y-axis-label').text('Difference'); await transition.end().catch(() => {}); plot.selectAll('rect.main-bar') .filter(d => +d.Year === 2019) .style('display', 'none'); const diffValueLabels = annotationLayer.selectAll('.diff-bar-value') .data(diffData) .enter() .append('text') .attr('class', 'diff-bar-value') .attr('data-company', d => d.company) .attr('data-diff', d => d.diff) .attr('x', d => diffX(diffLabelByCompany.get(d.company)) + diffX.bandwidth() / 2) .attr('y', d => diffY(d.diff) + Math.max(14, Math.min((plotHeight - diffY(d.diff)) / 2, 22))) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('dominant-baseline', 'middle') .attr('font-size', 20) .attr('font-weight', '600') .attr('fill', 'white') .style('opacity', 0) .text(d => d.diff); const minCompany = diffData.reduce((a, b) => (a.diff <= b.diff ? a : b)).company; const maxCompany = diffData.reduce((a, b) => (a.diff >= b.diff ? a : b)).company; const emphasisLabels = annotationLayer.selectAll('.diff-emphasis-label') .data(diffData.filter(d => d.company === minCompany || d.company === maxCompany)) .enter() .append('text') .attr('class', 'diff-emphasis-label') .attr('data-company', d => d.company) .attr('x', d => diffX(diffLabelByCompany.get(d.company)) + diffX.bandwidth() / 2) .attr('y', d => diffY(d.diff) - 14) .attr('text-anchor', 'middle') .attr('font-size', 20) .attr('font-weight', '700') .attr('fill', 'black') .style('opacity', 0) .text(d => d.company === maxCompany ? 'Max' : 'Min'); const labelTransition = svg.transition() .duration(600) .ease(ease); diffValueLabels.transition(labelTransition).style('opacity', 1); emphasisLabels.transition(labelTransition).style('opacity', 1); return labelTransition.end().catch(() => {}); })();

const svg = d3.select('svg');
const plot = svg.select('g[transform="translate(83.26164169671578,76)"]');

const avg = 65.67;
const y = 300 - ((avg - 20) / (85 - 20)) * 300;

plot.selectAll('.mean-annotation').remove();
plot.selectAll('.mean-reference-line').remove();
plot.selectAll('.mean-reference-label').remove();

const annotation = plot.insert('g', ':first-child')
  .attr('class', 'mean-annotation');

annotation.append('rect')
  .attr('x', 126)
  .attr('y', 8)
  .attr('width', 258)
  .attr('height', 28)
  .attr('rx', 6)
  .attr('ry', 6)
  .attr('fill', 'white')
  .attr('stroke', '#60a5fa')
  .attr('stroke-width', 1.5)
  .attr('opacity', 0.96);

annotation.append('text')
  .attr('x', 255)
  .attr('y', 26)
  .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
  .attr('font-size', 16)
  .attr('font-weight', 700)
  .attr('fill', '#1f2937')
  .text('(68 + 72 + 57) / 3 = 65.67%');

plot.append('line')
  .attr('class', 'mean-reference-line')
  .attr('x1', 0)
  .attr('x2', 510)
  .attr('y1', y)
  .attr('y2', y)
  .attr('stroke', '#60a5fa')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', '7,5')
  .attr('opacity', 0.95);

const label = plot.append('g')
  .attr('class', 'mean-reference-label');

label.append('rect')
  .attr('x', 382)
  .attr('y', y - 17)
  .attr('width', 122)
  .attr('height', 22)
  .attr('rx', 5)
  .attr('ry', 5)
  .attr('fill', 'white')
  .attr('stroke', '#60a5fa')
  .attr('stroke-width', 1.5)
  .attr('opacity', 0.96);

label.append('text')
  .attr('x', 443)
  .attr('y', y - 2)
  .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
  .attr('font-size', 13)
  .attr('font-weight', 700)
  .attr('fill', '#1f2937')
  .text('Average = 65.67%');

0rfuaawgi58ajpsv.d3_code:
const svg = d3.select('svg');

const naVals = [8.61, 9.74, 9.30, 10.66, 9.58];
const laVals = [0.99, 1.17, 1.14, 1.21, 1.27];
const naAvg = d3.mean(naVals);
const laAvg = d3.mean(laVals);
const diff = naAvg - laAvg;

svg.selectAll('.scene-annotation, .value-callout, .summary-box').remove();

svg.append('g')
  .attr('class', 'scene-annotation')
  .call(g => {
    g.append('rect')
      .attr('x', 350)
      .attr('y', 10)
      .attr('width', 825)
      .attr('height', 34)
      .attr('rx', 8)
      .attr('ry', 8)
      .attr('fill', '#eff6ff')
      .attr('stroke', '#93c5fd');

    g.append('text')
      .attr('x', 762.5)
      .attr('y', 32)
      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
      .attr('font-size', 20)
      .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
      .attr('fill', '#1d4ed8')
      .text('Step 3: Difference between the two regional averages');
  });

svg.selectAll('rect.main-bar')
  .attr('opacity', 0.18)
  .attr('stroke', null)
  .attr('stroke-width', null)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', null);

svg.selectAll('rect.main-bar[data-target="North America"]')
  .attr('opacity', 1)
  .attr('stroke', '#1f2937')
  .attr('stroke-width', 3)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', null);

svg.selectAll('rect.main-bar[data-target="Latin America"]')
  .attr('opacity', 1)
  .attr('stroke', '#1f2937')
  .attr('stroke-width', 3)
  .attr('stroke-dasharray', '7,4');

svg.select('.color-legend').attr('opacity', 0.75);

const box = svg.append('g')
  .attr('class', 'summary-box')
  .attr('transform', 'translate(1450,240)');

box.append('rect')
  .attr('x', 0)
  .attr('y', 0)
  .attr('width', 320)
  .attr('height', 140)
  .attr('rx', 12)
  .attr('ry', 12)
  .attr('fill', '#ffffff')
  .attr('stroke', '#94a3b8')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2);

box.append('text')
  .attr('x', 18)
  .attr('y', 28)
  .attr('font-size', 18)
  .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
  .attr('fill', '#0f172a')
  .text('Regional averages');

box.append('text')
  .attr('x', 18)
  .attr('y', 58)
  .attr('font-size', 17)
  .attr('fill', '#1f2937')
  .text(`Avg(North America) = ${naAvg.toFixed(2)}`);

box.append('text')
  .attr('x', 18)
  .attr('y', 88)
  .attr('font-size', 17)
  .attr('fill', '#1f2937')
  .text(`Avg(Latin America) = ${laAvg.toFixed(2)}`);

box.append('path')
  .attr('d', 'M18,98 L140,98')
  .attr('stroke', '#64748b')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2);

box.append('text')
  .attr('x', 18)
  .attr('y', 125)
  .attr('font-size', 18)
  .attr('font-weight', 'bold')
  .attr('fill', '#b91c1c')
  .text(`Difference = ${diff.toFixed(2)}`);

box.append('path')
  .attr('d', 'M255,56 C280,56 280,84 255,84')
  .attr('fill', 'none')
  .attr('stroke', '#64748b')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2);

box.append('path')
  .attr('d', 'M255,84 L255,113 L222,113')
  .attr('fill', 'none')
  .attr('stroke', '#64748b')
  .attr('stroke-width', 2);

box.append('polygon')
  .attr('points', '222,113 230,109 230,117')
  .attr('fill', '#64748b');
